best_individual: add(step_penalty_adder(distance, 0.906, step_penalty_adder(distance, mul(step_penalty_multiplier(0.377, steepness, distance), distance), if_then_else(is_water, distance, 0.782))), steepness)

hall_of_fame.individual: add(step_penalty_adder(distance, 0.906, step_penalty_adder(distance, mul(step_penalty_multiplier(0.377, steepness, distance), distance), if_then_else(is_water, distance, 0.782))), steepness)

add(step_penalty_adder(distance, 0.88, step_penalty_adder(distance, mul(step_penalty_multiplier(0.625, steepness, distance), add(distance, steepness)), if_then_else(is_water, distance, 0.76))), steepness)
add(step_penalty_adder(distance, 0.88, if_then_else(is_water, distance, 0.76)), if_then_else(is_water, step_penalty_adder(distance, 0.926, 0.76), steepness))
add(step_penalty_adder(distance, 0.88, if_then_else(is_water, distance, 0.76)), if_then_else(is_water, step_penalty_adder(distance, 0.926, if_then_else(is_water, distance, 0.76)), steepness))
add(step_penalty_adder(distance, 0.88, if_then_else(is_water, distance, 0.76)), if_then_else(is_water, distance, steepness))
